articles.author: Paul Abelsky, Dan Murtaugh, Yvonne Man, Jenni Marsh
articles.title: Live Q&A: What Putin's China Visit Means for Beijing’s Ties With Russia and the US - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Bloomberg reporters take your questions on how the latest Russia-China agreements and the push for the Power of Siberia 2 pipeline will impact global energy markets and US relations with the Asian nation.
articles.content: Russia and China are strengthening their alliance by signing 20 new agreements spanning trade, technology and energy, alongside a joint statement on preserving a multi-polar world, just after US Pres… [+674 chars]
